notes: Works Perfectly. Performance is faster than Windows I've Noticed. Multiplayer works great too.
title: Farm Together

notes:
Game works perfect after you set this up in the launch options.  But not in Full screen. 

-screen-fullscreen 1 -screen-width 1920 -screen-height 1080 -force-glcore42 -force-clamped  ( the first time you need to disable fullscreen and restart the game and it works good)
title: Farm Together

notes:
the game did not open properly, initially opened only a color background without texts or information, but audio playing. looking for solutions I found the following commands and it worked:

-force-glcore42 -force-clamped
-screen-fullscreen 1 -screen-width 1920 -screen-height 1080
title: Farm Together
